page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs utilizing the Intel Xeon 8369B processor clocked at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. Local storage is not bundled, and there are no onboard GPUs. Network connectivity is supported by a 32 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core CPU, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 25%. The instance excels in parallel processing tasks, as demonstrated by strong results in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, software compilation with Clang, and ray tracing. Single-core performance, including stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core metrics, falls within the average range.

Memory performance shows a high-speed cached read bandwidth of 3379.87 GB/sec, while uncached large-block read and write speeds remain in the average tier. Cryptographic operations are highly efficient, supported by hardware-accelerated instruction sets like AES, VAES, and SHA-NI, alongside AVX and AVX-512 vector extensions.

This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring dense multi-core execution without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware or local storage. It is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, static web serving, and software compilation pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it includes 256.0 GB of RAM, 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no bundled local storage or GPUs. The instance delivers strong multi-core performance, as evidenced by top-tier benchmarks in multi-threaded decompression, software compilation, and database operations. Single-core performance and uncached memory bandwidth remain average. Supported by AVX-512 and cryptographic hardware acceleration, this instance is optimized for parallel processing, static web serving, and enterprise database workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps bandwidth for strong multi-core workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core Intel Xeon platform delivering balanced memory and strong multi-threaded performance for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong multi-core performance in software compilation and database operations
Hardware-accelerated cryptography and AVX-512 vector extensions
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
